headlines.title: GSK plc (NUVL) plans cash tender offer for Nuvalent under merger agreement - Stock Titan
AASTOCKS Financial News - Nuvalent, Inc. (NUVL) - AASTOCKS.com

verification.primary_claim: NUVL is being acquired by GlaxoSmithKline for $124 per share.
verification.discrepancy_note: Source A (Finviz) has no information regarding an acquisition or tender offer for NUVL. Source B (Google News) articles [1], [2], and [4] confirm a merger/acquisition/tender offer by GSK for NUVL, with article [4] specifically stating a '$124-Per-Share Tender Offer'. Since only one set of sources provides the specific financial claim, it is marked as a discrepancy.

headlines.title: Is Reddit, Inc. (RDDT) A Good Stock To Buy Now? - Yahoo Finance

verification.primary_claim: RDDT gap lacks a clear fundamental catalyst.
verification.discrepancy_note: The primary catalyst claim states RDDT lacks a clear fundamental catalyst. However, Google News [4] explicitly reports a specific fundamental corporate action: 'All director nominees, auditor ratification, and executive pay were approved without contest.' This constitutes a clear fundamental event that could act as a catalyst, directly contradicting the 'lack of a clear fundamental catalyst' claim.
